meanings.definition: to cause inconvenience or discomfort to

examples: He put out the same for seven managers

meanings.definition: deprive of the oxygen necessary for combustion
put out, as of a candle or a light

examples: She is supposed to put out

meanings.definition: cause to be out on a fielding play

examples: he was put out at third base on a long throw from left field

meanings.definition: prepare and issue for public distribution or sale

examples: The patient must be anesthetized before the operation
anesthetize the gum before extracting the teeth
